case_title: SEAN PHELAN VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHELAN, SEAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-05-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "THE PARTIES HAVE RESOLVED THEIR DISPUTE. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $11.65 BY CASHIER'S CHECK ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 22, 2014. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO WILL ALSO REMOVE OR REVERSE ALL NEGATIVE REPORTS WITH CHEXSYSTEM AND CREDIT AGENCIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJDUICE", PER PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAS PRESENT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHELAN, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 8/8/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,135.66 FILED BY PHELAN, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-03-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY PHELAN, SEAN WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
